title: RapidMeta Neuromuscular | Delandistrogene Moxeparvovec Gene Therapy for Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy v1.0
hero_h2: Delandistrogene Moxeparvovec in Ambulatory Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy

pico.pop: Ambulatory boys aged 4-7 years with genetically-confirmed Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD mutation in deletion-amenable region), no prior gene therapy, no prior corticosteroid contraindication
pico.int: Delandistrogene moxeparvovec single IV infusion 1.33 x 10^14 vg/kg (AAV-rh74-vector micro-dystrophin gene therapy)
pico.comp: Placebo single IV infusion (cross-over to active at week 52 in part 2)
pico.out: North Star Ambulatory Assessment (NSAA) total score change from baseline at week 52 (primary; MD vs placebo)
pico.subgroup: Age stratum (4-5 vs 6-7), baseline NSAA, dystrophin expression at week 12, anti-AAVrh74 status

real_data_entries.name: EMBARK
real_data_entries.group: Ambulatory DMD boys 4-7 yrs, delandistrogene moxeparvovec single IV vs placebo (52-wk NSAA score change MD; did not meet primary)

allOutcomes.title: NSAA total score change from baseline at week 52 (primary; MD vs placebo)
Time to rise from floor (Gowers manoeuvre) at week 52 (seconds; MD vs placebo; favours less time)
10-meter walk/run velocity at week 52 (m/s; MD vs placebo)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Mendell JR et al. NEJM 2024 (EMBARK; primary not met but functional secondaries favoured gene therapy).
